'''鈭歞-t-zh-d''' ('''kadatzhedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backpeddle|backpeddle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-t-zh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backpeddle|backpeddle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-t-zh-d
|-
! Lemma
| kadatzhedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidatzhedoko|thidatzhedoko]] || [[word:jidatzhedoko|jidatzhedoko]] || [[word:shidatzhedoko|shidatzhedoko]] || [[word:kidatzhedoko|kidatzhedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudatzhedoko|thuthudatzhedoko]] || [[word:jujudatzhedoko|jujudatzhedoko]] || [[word:shushudatzhedoko|shushudatzhedoko]] || [[word:kukudatzhedoko|kukudatzhedoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudatzhedoko|thudatzhedoko]] || [[word:judatzhedoko|judatzhedoko]] || [[word:shudatzhedoko|shudatzhedoko]] || [[word:kudatzhedoko|kudatzhedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedatzhedoko|thedatzhedoko]] || [[word:jedatzhedoko|jedatzhedoko]] || [[word:shedatzhedoko|shedatzhedoko]] || [[word:kedatzhedoko|kedatzhedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodatzhedoko|thothodatzhedoko]] || [[word:jojodatzhedoko|jojodatzhedoko]] || [[word:shoshodatzhedoko|shoshodatzhedoko]] || [[word:kokodatzhedoko|kokodatzhedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodatzhedoko|thodatzhedoko]] || [[word:jodatzhedoko|jodatzhedoko]] || [[word:shodatzhedoko|shodatzhedoko]] || [[word:kodatzhedoko|kodatzhedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodatzhedoko|thodatzhedoko]] || [[word:jodatzhedoko|jodatzhedoko]] || [[word:shodatzhedoko|shodatzhedoko]] || [[word:kodatzhedoko|kodatzhedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙datzhedoko|th忙datzhedoko]] || [[word:j忙datzhedoko|j忙datzhedoko]] || [[word:sh忙datzhedoko|sh忙datzhedoko]] || [[word:k忙datzhedoko|k忙datzhedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadatzhedoko|thathadatzhedoko]] || [[word:jajadatzhedoko|jajadatzhedoko]] || [[word:shashadatzhedoko|shashadatzhedoko]] || [[word:kakadatzhedoko|kakadatzhedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadatzhedoko|thadatzhedoko]] || [[word:jadatzhedoko|jadatzhedoko]] || [[word:shadatzhedoko|shadatzhedoko]] || [[word:kadatzhedoko|kadatzhedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadatzhedoko|thadatzhedoko]] || [[word:jadatzhedoko|jadatzhedoko]] || [[word:shadatzhedoko|shadatzhedoko]] || [[word:kadatzhedoko|kadatzhedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
